records.m_SubTitle_ENG: 2 hours after the Omen Protocol Activation
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: 2 hours after the Omen Protocol Activation
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: 2 hours after the Omen Protocol Activation

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood. I have a clear grasp of the situation in Charade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood. I have a clear grasp of the situation in Charade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood. I have a clear grasp of the situation in Charade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even without a Senior's oversight, you eliminated a Category 5 C.O. that appeared in the city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even without a Senior's oversight, you eliminated a Category 5 C.O. that appeared in the city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even without a Senior's oversight, you eliminated a Category 5 C.O. that appeared in the city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And before the alarm was issued, you evacuated 70% of the major districts' civilians into safe shelters?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And before the alarm was issued, you evacuated 70% of the major districts' civilians into safe shelters?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And before the alarm was issued, you evacuated 70% of the major districts' civilians into safe shelters?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's unexpected, Ozymandias.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's unexpected, Ozymandias.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's unexpected, Ozymandias.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're far more reliable than what I heard from Richard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're far more reliable than what I heard from Richard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're far more reliable than what I heard from Richard.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG:
<color=#ffd34c>Charade's Acting Authority</color>
Ground One Senior, Ren959e Maalouf
records.m_SubTitle_DEU:
<color=#ffd34c>Charade's Acting Authority</color>
Ground One Senior, Ren959e Maalouf
records.m_SubTitle_FRA:
<color=#ffd34c>Charade's Acting Authority</color>
Ground One Senior, Ren959e Maalouf

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Would it kill you to praise someone properly for once?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Would it kill you to praise someone properly for once?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Would it kill you to praise someone properly for once?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I hadn't stepped in when I did, do you really think Charade would've come out unscathed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I hadn't stepped in when I did, do you really think Charade would've come out unscathed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I hadn't stepped in when I did, do you really think Charade would've come out unscathed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this is what you're calling an omen phenomenon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this is what you're calling an omen phenomenon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this is what you're calling an omen phenomenon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said similar incidents are happening simultaneously at Grand Dimension Crevices all over the world, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said similar incidents are happening simultaneously at Grand Dimension Crevices all over the world, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said similar incidents are happening simultaneously at Grand Dimension Crevices all over the world, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The Administration has issued the highest-level disaster alert.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The Administration has issued the highest-level disaster alert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The Administration has issued the highest-level disaster alert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've also heard that Campamento and Chamber, both lacking Seniors, are responding accordingly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've also heard that Campamento and Chamber, both lacking Seniors, are responding accordingly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've also heard that Campamento and Chamber, both lacking Seniors, are responding accordingly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And reports of cultist activity have come in from Ground One as well, just like in Charade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And reports of cultist activity have come in from Ground One as well, just like in Charade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And reports of cultist activity have come in from Ground One as well, just like in Charade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems the outline of the incident is finally taking shape.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems the outline of the incident is finally taking shape.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems the outline of the incident is finally taking shape.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Acting Authority Maalouf, now is not the time for this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Acting Authority Maalouf, now is not the time for this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Acting Authority Maalouf, now is not the time for this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even as we speak, the Grand Dimension Crevice continues to expand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even as we speak, the Grand Dimension Crevice continues to expand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even as we speak, the Grand Dimension Crevice continues to expand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, all of Charade will soon be swallowed by it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, all of Charade will soon be swallowed by it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, all of Charade will soon be swallowed by it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must establish countermeasures immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must establish countermeasures immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must establish countermeasures immediately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Many civilians have evacuated, but there are also those in this city without citizenship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Many civilians have evacuated, but there are also those in this city without citizenship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Many civilians have evacuated, but there are also those in this city without citizenship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We, the Zodiac Knights, cannot turn our backs on them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We, the Zodiac Knights, cannot turn our backs on them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We, the Zodiac Knights, cannot turn our backs on them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must raise an objection, Dame Chevalier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must raise an objection, Dame Chevalier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must raise an objection, Dame Chevalier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you are under a misunderstanding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you are under a misunderstanding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you are under a misunderstanding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a TASKFORCE, the Zodiac Knights are assigned to Charade as your designated sector.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a TASKFORCE, the Zodiac Knights are assigned to Charade as your designated sector.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a TASKFORCE, the Zodiac Knights are assigned to Charade as your designated sector.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, in the event of a disaster, your duty is to defend your assigned area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, in the event of a disaster, your duty is to defend your assigned area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, in the event of a disaster, your duty is to defend your assigned area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not to protect impoverished people who lack even citizenship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not to protect impoverished people who lack even citizenship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not to protect impoverished people who lack even citizenship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying we should abandon the poor?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying we should abandon the poor?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying we should abandon the poor?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's heartless, isn't it? Just because they're poor doesn't make them any less human!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's heartless, isn't it? Just because they're poor doesn't make them any less human!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's heartless, isn't it? Just because they're poor doesn't make them any less human!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Human? Well... can we truly call them human in this city?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Human? Well... can we truly call them human in this city?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Human? Well... can we truly call them human in this city?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you say?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you say?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you say?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: To begin with, human worth is not equal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To begin with, human worth is not equal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To begin with, human worth is not equal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those you wish to protect are merely illegal residents who do not even qualify as third-grade citizens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those you wish to protect are merely illegal residents who do not even qualify as third-grade citizens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those you wish to protect are merely illegal residents who do not even qualify as third-grade citizens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Charade Administration has no obligation to provide them with defense services.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Charade Administration has no obligation to provide them with defense services.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Charade Administration has no obligation to provide them with defense services.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-That's...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-That's...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-That's...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we were to save the poor, where would you house them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we were to save the poor, where would you house them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we were to save the poor, where would you house them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's safe shelters are meant for this city's citizens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's safe shelters are meant for this city's citizens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's safe shelters are meant for this city's citizens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Housing law-abiding taxpayers alongside illegal residents would be absurd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Housing law-abiding taxpayers alongside illegal residents would be absurd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Housing law-abiding taxpayers alongside illegal residents would be absurd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And your responsibility is to protect this city's citizens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And your responsibility is to protect this city's citizens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And your responsibility is to protect this city's citizens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that not correct, Dame Chevalier?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that not correct, Dame Chevalier?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that not correct, Dame Chevalier?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your argument is logically sound.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your argument is logically sound.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your argument is logically sound.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-Captain...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-Captain...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-Captain...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, I refuse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, I refuse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, I refuse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Choosing who deserves saving runs counter to the chivalry of the Zodiac Knights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Choosing who deserves saving runs counter to the chivalry of the Zodiac Knights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Choosing who deserves saving runs counter to the chivalry of the Zodiac Knights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether the hand reaching out belongs to the poor or the wealthy...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether the hand reaching out belongs to the poor or the wealthy...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether the hand reaching out belongs to the poor or the wealthy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If someone asks for help, we are duty-bound to take their hand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If someone asks for help, we are duty-bound to take their hand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If someone asks for help, we are duty-bound to take their hand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How foolish, Dame Chevalier. Society is upheld not by individuals, but by systems.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How foolish, Dame Chevalier. Society is upheld not by individuals, but by systems.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How foolish, Dame Chevalier. Society is upheld not by individuals, but by systems.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That claim is nothing more than lofty idealism. Mere clownery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That claim is nothing more than lofty idealism. Mere clownery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That claim is nothing more than lofty idealism. Mere clownery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, clownery...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, clownery...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, clownery...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the system you speak of was created by humans, and thus imperfect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the system you speak of was created by humans, and thus imperfect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the system you speak of was created by humans, and thus imperfect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So if saving people is to be called clownery...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So if saving people is to be called clownery...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So if saving people is to be called clownery...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then we shall gladly become clowns.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then we shall gladly become clowns.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then we shall gladly become clowns.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. As stubborn as the rumors say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. As stubborn as the rumors say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. As stubborn as the rumors say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enough. This discussion is going nowhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Enough. This discussion is going nowhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Enough. This discussion is going nowhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Both of you, calm down. You're Grade S Counters, the city's greatest assets!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Both of you, calm down. You're Grade S Counters, the city's greatest assets!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Both of you, calm down. You're Grade S Counters, the city's greatest assets!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ozymandias, shouldn't you be mediating this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ozymandias, shouldn't you be mediating this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ozymandias, shouldn't you be mediating this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why should I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why should I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why should I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watching this turn into a fight sounds entertaining enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watching this turn into a fight sounds entertaining enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watching this turn into a fight sounds entertaining enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh. Honestly, none of you are any help at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh. Honestly, none of you are any help at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh. Honestly, none of you are any help at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, what about you two? What do you plan to do about the Holy Curia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, what about you two? What do you plan to do about the Holy Curia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, what about you two? What do you plan to do about the Holy Curia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since the fugitive escaped, shouldn't you return to the Holy Curia first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since the fugitive escaped, shouldn't you return to the Holy Curia first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since the fugitive escaped, shouldn't you return to the Holy Curia first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Holy Curia, my foot! How did things even end up like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Holy Curia, my foot! How did things even end up like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Holy Curia, my foot! How did things even end up like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Lucia. One wrong word here and it's all over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Lucia. One wrong word here and it's all over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Lucia. One wrong word here and it's all over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Either that Dean of Law will have my head...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Either that Dean of Law will have my head...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Either that Dean of Law will have my head...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or I'll be wanted by the Administration for the rest of my life...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or I'll be wanted by the Administration for the rest of my life...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or I'll be wanted by the Administration for the rest of my life...

records.m_Talk_ENG: One or the other... No, maybe both...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: One or the other... No, maybe both...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: One or the other... No, maybe both...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: J-just act like you always do! You're used to this kind of thing, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: J-just act like you always do! You're used to this kind of thing, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: J-just act like you always do! You're used to this kind of thing, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Given the current atmosphere, the best choice for the Religion Department is...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Given the current atmosphere, the best choice for the Religion Department is...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Given the current atmosphere, the best choice for the Religion Department is...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Lord has always said so.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Lord has always said so.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Lord has always said so.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Love your neighbor as yourself...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Love your neighbor as yourself...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Love your neighbor as yourself...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today, through Dame Chevalier's words, I have come to understand that teaching anew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today, through Dame Chevalier's words, I have come to understand that teaching anew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today, through Dame Chevalier's words, I have come to understand that teaching anew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-Sister?
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-Sister?
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-Sister?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, junk food. What kind of nonsense are you suddenly spouting?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, junk food. What kind of nonsense are you suddenly spouting?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, junk food. What kind of nonsense are you suddenly spouting?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shh. I have a plan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shh. I have a plan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shh. I have a plan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though the duty granted to the Inquisitors by the Holy Curia may be the defense of the Holy Curia itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though the duty granted to the Inquisitors by the Holy Curia may be the defense of the Holy Curia itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though the duty granted to the Inquisitors by the Holy Curia may be the defense of the Holy Curia itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Turning away from the pitiful souls of this city is surely not what the Lord desires.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Turning away from the pitiful souls of this city is surely not what the Lord desires.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Turning away from the pitiful souls of this city is surely not what the Lord desires.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We, too, shall lend our strength to protect this city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We, too, shall lend our strength to protect this city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We, too, shall lend our strength to protect this city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. The Administration thanks the Holy Curia for its cooperation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. The Administration thanks the Holy Curia for its cooperation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. The Administration thanks the Holy Curia for its cooperation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once the disaster is over and stability is restored, I promise official compensation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once the disaster is over and stability is restored, I promise official compensation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once the disaster is over and stability is restored, I promise official compensation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-compensation...? How much? How much are we talking?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-compensation...? How much? How much are we talking?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-compensation...? How much? How much are we talking?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a farce.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a farce.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a farce.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Old Voice urgently requested the Institution's cooperation, and I obliged...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Old Voice urgently requested the Institution's cooperation, and I obliged...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Old Voice urgently requested the Institution's cooperation, and I obliged...

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-Lady Elizabeth...! Representatives of every organization are present...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-Lady Elizabeth...! Representatives of every organization are present...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-Lady Elizabeth...! Representatives of every organization are present...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what? Shall we continue indulging in this ridiculous armchair debate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what? Shall we continue indulging in this ridiculous armchair debate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what? Shall we continue indulging in this ridiculous armchair debate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time. I'll be brief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time. I'll be brief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time. I'll be brief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once an omen phenomenon has begun, it cannot be stopped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once an omen phenomenon has begun, it cannot be stopped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once an omen phenomenon has begun, it cannot be stopped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Track Switcher scheduled to arrive in this city will only delay the phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Track Switcher scheduled to arrive in this city will only delay the phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Track Switcher scheduled to arrive in this city will only delay the phenomenon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is by no means a fundamental solution that addresses the cause.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is by no means a fundamental solution that addresses the cause.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is by no means a fundamental solution that addresses the cause.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, with the world facing an unprecedented crisis...
records.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, with the world facing an unprecedented crisis...
records.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, with the world facing an unprecedented crisis...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The cult, <color=#ffd34c>Children of Yaldabaoth</color>, will not let this moment pass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The cult, <color=#ffd34c>Children of Yaldabaoth</color>, will not let this moment pass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The cult, <color=#ffd34c>Children of Yaldabaoth</color>, will not let this moment pass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They will certainly attempt to intervene.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They will certainly attempt to intervene.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They will certainly attempt to intervene.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, this very situation may already be the result of their interference.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, this very situation may already be the result of their interference.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, this very situation may already be the result of their interference.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Therefore, Lamda Spatari.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Therefore, Lamda Spatari.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Therefore, Lamda Spatari.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deliver this message to your <color=#ffd34c>friend</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deliver this message to your <color=#ffd34c>friend</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deliver this message to your <color=#ffd34c>friend</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noblesse oblige. Do not stand idly by when duty calls.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noblesse oblige. Do not stand idly by when duty calls.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noblesse oblige. Do not stand idly by when duty calls.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot promise anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot promise anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot promise anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't expect you to. Delivering the message is enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't expect you to. Delivering the message is enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't expect you to. Delivering the message is enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Ryan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Ryan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Ryan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as all unnamed agents who vanished before us did...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as all unnamed agents who vanished before us did...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as all unnamed agents who vanished before us did...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether victory is possible or not, the Institution will fulfill its duty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether victory is possible or not, the Institution will fulfill its duty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether victory is possible or not, the Institution will fulfill its duty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Duty, huh? Honestly, the Institution never gets a break...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Duty, huh? Honestly, the Institution never gets a break...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Duty, huh? Honestly, the Institution never gets a break...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But isn't a gamble with no odds just boring?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But isn't a gamble with no odds just boring?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But isn't a gamble with no odds just boring?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, what do you say, Chief?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, what do you say, Chief?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, what do you say, Chief?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you join hands with me, I could raise your odds by at least 5%.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you join hands with me, I could raise your odds by at least 5%.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you join hands with me, I could raise your odds by at least 5%.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Abigail...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Abigail...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Abigail...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agnes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agnes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agnes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I here? That's kind of hurtful...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I here? That's kind of hurtful...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I here? That's kind of hurtful...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course I came to help my little darlings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course I came to help my little darlings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course I came to help my little darlings.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: 2 hours after the Omen Protocol Activation
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: 2 hours after the Omen Protocol Activation
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: 2 hours after the Omen Protocol Activation

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood. I have a clear grasp of the situation in Charade.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood. I have a clear grasp of the situation in Charade.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood. I have a clear grasp of the situation in Charade.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even without a Senior's oversight, you eliminated a Category 5 C.O. that appeared in the city.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even without a Senior's oversight, you eliminated a Category 5 C.O. that appeared in the city.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even without a Senior's oversight, you eliminated a Category 5 C.O. that appeared in the city.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And before the alarm was issued, you evacuated 70% of the major districts' civilians into safe shelters?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And before the alarm was issued, you evacuated 70% of the major districts' civilians into safe shelters?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And before the alarm was issued, you evacuated 70% of the major districts' civilians into safe shelters?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's unexpected, Ozymandias.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's unexpected, Ozymandias.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's unexpected, Ozymandias.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're far more reliable than what I heard from Richard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're far more reliable than what I heard from Richard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're far more reliable than what I heard from Richard.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG:
<color=#ffd34c>Charade's Acting Authority</color>
Ground One Senior, Ren959e Maalouf
root.m_SubTitle_DEU:
<color=#ffd34c>Charade's Acting Authority</color>
Ground One Senior, Ren959e Maalouf
root.m_SubTitle_FRA:
<color=#ffd34c>Charade's Acting Authority</color>
Ground One Senior, Ren959e Maalouf

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Would it kill you to praise someone properly for once?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Would it kill you to praise someone properly for once?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Would it kill you to praise someone properly for once?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I hadn't stepped in when I did, do you really think Charade would've come out unscathed?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I hadn't stepped in when I did, do you really think Charade would've come out unscathed?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I hadn't stepped in when I did, do you really think Charade would've come out unscathed?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So this is what you're calling an omen phenomenon?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So this is what you're calling an omen phenomenon?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So this is what you're calling an omen phenomenon?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said similar incidents are happening simultaneously at Grand Dimension Crevices all over the world, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said similar incidents are happening simultaneously at Grand Dimension Crevices all over the world, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said similar incidents are happening simultaneously at Grand Dimension Crevices all over the world, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The Administration has issued the highest-level disaster alert.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The Administration has issued the highest-level disaster alert.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The Administration has issued the highest-level disaster alert.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've also heard that Campamento and Chamber, both lacking Seniors, are responding accordingly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've also heard that Campamento and Chamber, both lacking Seniors, are responding accordingly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've also heard that Campamento and Chamber, both lacking Seniors, are responding accordingly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And reports of cultist activity have come in from Ground One as well, just like in Charade.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And reports of cultist activity have come in from Ground One as well, just like in Charade.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And reports of cultist activity have come in from Ground One as well, just like in Charade.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems the outline of the incident is finally taking shape.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems the outline of the incident is finally taking shape.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems the outline of the incident is finally taking shape.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Acting Authority Maalouf, now is not the time for this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Acting Authority Maalouf, now is not the time for this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Acting Authority Maalouf, now is not the time for this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even as we speak, the Grand Dimension Crevice continues to expand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even as we speak, the Grand Dimension Crevice continues to expand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even as we speak, the Grand Dimension Crevice continues to expand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, all of Charade will soon be swallowed by it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, all of Charade will soon be swallowed by it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, all of Charade will soon be swallowed by it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We must establish countermeasures immediately.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We must establish countermeasures immediately.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We must establish countermeasures immediately.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Many civilians have evacuated, but there are also those in this city without citizenship.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Many civilians have evacuated, but there are also those in this city without citizenship.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Many civilians have evacuated, but there are also those in this city without citizenship.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We, the Zodiac Knights, cannot turn our backs on them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We, the Zodiac Knights, cannot turn our backs on them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We, the Zodiac Knights, cannot turn our backs on them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must raise an objection, Dame Chevalier.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must raise an objection, Dame Chevalier.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must raise an objection, Dame Chevalier.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It seems you are under a misunderstanding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It seems you are under a misunderstanding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It seems you are under a misunderstanding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a TASKFORCE, the Zodiac Knights are assigned to Charade as your designated sector.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a TASKFORCE, the Zodiac Knights are assigned to Charade as your designated sector.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a TASKFORCE, the Zodiac Knights are assigned to Charade as your designated sector.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, in the event of a disaster, your duty is to defend your assigned area.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, in the event of a disaster, your duty is to defend your assigned area.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, in the event of a disaster, your duty is to defend your assigned area.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not to protect impoverished people who lack even citizenship.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not to protect impoverished people who lack even citizenship.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not to protect impoverished people who lack even citizenship.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying we should abandon the poor?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying we should abandon the poor?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying we should abandon the poor?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's heartless, isn't it? Just because they're poor doesn't make them any less human!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's heartless, isn't it? Just because they're poor doesn't make them any less human!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's heartless, isn't it? Just because they're poor doesn't make them any less human!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Human? Well... can we truly call them human in this city?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Human? Well... can we truly call them human in this city?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Human? Well... can we truly call them human in this city?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you say?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you say?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you say?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: To begin with, human worth is not equal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To begin with, human worth is not equal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To begin with, human worth is not equal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those you wish to protect are merely illegal residents who do not even qualify as third-grade citizens.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those you wish to protect are merely illegal residents who do not even qualify as third-grade citizens.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those you wish to protect are merely illegal residents who do not even qualify as third-grade citizens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Charade Administration has no obligation to provide them with defense services.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Charade Administration has no obligation to provide them with defense services.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Charade Administration has no obligation to provide them with defense services.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-That's...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-That's...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-That's...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if we were to save the poor, where would you house them?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if we were to save the poor, where would you house them?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if we were to save the poor, where would you house them?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration's safe shelters are meant for this city's citizens.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration's safe shelters are meant for this city's citizens.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration's safe shelters are meant for this city's citizens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Housing law-abiding taxpayers alongside illegal residents would be absurd.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Housing law-abiding taxpayers alongside illegal residents would be absurd.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Housing law-abiding taxpayers alongside illegal residents would be absurd.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And your responsibility is to protect this city's citizens.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And your responsibility is to protect this city's citizens.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And your responsibility is to protect this city's citizens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that not correct, Dame Chevalier?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that not correct, Dame Chevalier?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that not correct, Dame Chevalier?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your argument is logically sound.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your argument is logically sound.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your argument is logically sound.

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-Captain...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-Captain...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-Captain...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, I refuse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, I refuse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, I refuse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Choosing who deserves saving runs counter to the chivalry of the Zodiac Knights.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Choosing who deserves saving runs counter to the chivalry of the Zodiac Knights.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Choosing who deserves saving runs counter to the chivalry of the Zodiac Knights.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whether the hand reaching out belongs to the poor or the wealthy...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whether the hand reaching out belongs to the poor or the wealthy...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whether the hand reaching out belongs to the poor or the wealthy...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If someone asks for help, we are duty-bound to take their hand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If someone asks for help, we are duty-bound to take their hand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If someone asks for help, we are duty-bound to take their hand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How foolish, Dame Chevalier. Society is upheld not by individuals, but by systems.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How foolish, Dame Chevalier. Society is upheld not by individuals, but by systems.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How foolish, Dame Chevalier. Society is upheld not by individuals, but by systems.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That claim is nothing more than lofty idealism. Mere clownery.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That claim is nothing more than lofty idealism. Mere clownery.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That claim is nothing more than lofty idealism. Mere clownery.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, clownery...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, clownery...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, clownery...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the system you speak of was created by humans, and thus imperfect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the system you speak of was created by humans, and thus imperfect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the system you speak of was created by humans, and thus imperfect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So if saving people is to be called clownery...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So if saving people is to be called clownery...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So if saving people is to be called clownery...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then we shall gladly become clowns.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then we shall gladly become clowns.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then we shall gladly become clowns.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. As stubborn as the rumors say.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. As stubborn as the rumors say.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. As stubborn as the rumors say.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Enough. This discussion is going nowhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Enough. This discussion is going nowhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Enough. This discussion is going nowhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Both of you, calm down. You're Grade S Counters, the city's greatest assets!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Both of you, calm down. You're Grade S Counters, the city's greatest assets!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Both of you, calm down. You're Grade S Counters, the city's greatest assets!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ozymandias, shouldn't you be mediating this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ozymandias, shouldn't you be mediating this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ozymandias, shouldn't you be mediating this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why should I?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why should I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why should I?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Watching this turn into a fight sounds entertaining enough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Watching this turn into a fight sounds entertaining enough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Watching this turn into a fight sounds entertaining enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh. Honestly, none of you are any help at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh. Honestly, none of you are any help at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh. Honestly, none of you are any help at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, what about you two? What do you plan to do about the Holy Curia?
root.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, what about you two? What do you plan to do about the Holy Curia?
root.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, what about you two? What do you plan to do about the Holy Curia?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since the fugitive escaped, shouldn't you return to the Holy Curia first?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since the fugitive escaped, shouldn't you return to the Holy Curia first?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since the fugitive escaped, shouldn't you return to the Holy Curia first?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Holy Curia, my foot! How did things even end up like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Holy Curia, my foot! How did things even end up like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Holy Curia, my foot! How did things even end up like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Lucia. One wrong word here and it's all over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Lucia. One wrong word here and it's all over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Lucia. One wrong word here and it's all over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Either that Dean of Law will have my head...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Either that Dean of Law will have my head...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Either that Dean of Law will have my head...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or I'll be wanted by the Administration for the rest of my life...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or I'll be wanted by the Administration for the rest of my life...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or I'll be wanted by the Administration for the rest of my life...

root.m_Talk_ENG: One or the other... No, maybe both...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: One or the other... No, maybe both...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: One or the other... No, maybe both...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: J-just act like you always do! You're used to this kind of thing, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: J-just act like you always do! You're used to this kind of thing, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: J-just act like you always do! You're used to this kind of thing, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Given the current atmosphere, the best choice for the Religion Department is...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Given the current atmosphere, the best choice for the Religion Department is...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Given the current atmosphere, the best choice for the Religion Department is...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Lord has always said so.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Lord has always said so.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Lord has always said so.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Love your neighbor as yourself...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Love your neighbor as yourself...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Love your neighbor as yourself...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today, through Dame Chevalier's words, I have come to understand that teaching anew.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today, through Dame Chevalier's words, I have come to understand that teaching anew.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today, through Dame Chevalier's words, I have come to understand that teaching anew.

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-Sister?
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-Sister?
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-Sister?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, junk food. What kind of nonsense are you suddenly spouting?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, junk food. What kind of nonsense are you suddenly spouting?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, junk food. What kind of nonsense are you suddenly spouting?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shh. I have a plan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shh. I have a plan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shh. I have a plan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though the duty granted to the Inquisitors by the Holy Curia may be the defense of the Holy Curia itself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though the duty granted to the Inquisitors by the Holy Curia may be the defense of the Holy Curia itself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though the duty granted to the Inquisitors by the Holy Curia may be the defense of the Holy Curia itself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Turning away from the pitiful souls of this city is surely not what the Lord desires.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Turning away from the pitiful souls of this city is surely not what the Lord desires.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Turning away from the pitiful souls of this city is surely not what the Lord desires.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We, too, shall lend our strength to protect this city.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We, too, shall lend our strength to protect this city.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We, too, shall lend our strength to protect this city.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. The Administration thanks the Holy Curia for its cooperation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. The Administration thanks the Holy Curia for its cooperation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. The Administration thanks the Holy Curia for its cooperation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once the disaster is over and stability is restored, I promise official compensation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once the disaster is over and stability is restored, I promise official compensation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once the disaster is over and stability is restored, I promise official compensation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: C-compensation...? How much? How much are we talking?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C-compensation...? How much? How much are we talking?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C-compensation...? How much? How much are we talking?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a farce.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a farce.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a farce.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Old Voice urgently requested the Institution's cooperation, and I obliged...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Old Voice urgently requested the Institution's cooperation, and I obliged...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Old Voice urgently requested the Institution's cooperation, and I obliged...

root.m_Talk_ENG: L-Lady Elizabeth...! Representatives of every organization are present...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: L-Lady Elizabeth...! Representatives of every organization are present...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: L-Lady Elizabeth...! Representatives of every organization are present...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So what? Shall we continue indulging in this ridiculous armchair debate?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So what? Shall we continue indulging in this ridiculous armchair debate?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So what? Shall we continue indulging in this ridiculous armchair debate?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time. I'll be brief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time. I'll be brief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time. I'll be brief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once an omen phenomenon has begun, it cannot be stopped.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once an omen phenomenon has begun, it cannot be stopped.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once an omen phenomenon has begun, it cannot be stopped.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Track Switcher scheduled to arrive in this city will only delay the phenomenon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Track Switcher scheduled to arrive in this city will only delay the phenomenon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Track Switcher scheduled to arrive in this city will only delay the phenomenon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is by no means a fundamental solution that addresses the cause.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is by no means a fundamental solution that addresses the cause.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is by no means a fundamental solution that addresses the cause.

root.m_Talk_ENG: More importantly, with the world facing an unprecedented crisis...
root.m_Talk_DEU: More importantly, with the world facing an unprecedented crisis...
root.m_Talk_FRA: More importantly, with the world facing an unprecedented crisis...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The cult, <color=#ffd34c>Children of Yaldabaoth</color>, will not let this moment pass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The cult, <color=#ffd34c>Children of Yaldabaoth</color>, will not let this moment pass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The cult, <color=#ffd34c>Children of Yaldabaoth</color>, will not let this moment pass.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They will certainly attempt to intervene.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They will certainly attempt to intervene.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They will certainly attempt to intervene.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, this very situation may already be the result of their interference.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, this very situation may already be the result of their interference.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, this very situation may already be the result of their interference.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Therefore, Lamda Spatari.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Therefore, Lamda Spatari.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Therefore, Lamda Spatari.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Deliver this message to your <color=#ffd34c>friend</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Deliver this message to your <color=#ffd34c>friend</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Deliver this message to your <color=#ffd34c>friend</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Noblesse oblige. Do not stand idly by when duty calls.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Noblesse oblige. Do not stand idly by when duty calls.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Noblesse oblige. Do not stand idly by when duty calls.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot promise anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot promise anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot promise anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't expect you to. Delivering the message is enough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't expect you to. Delivering the message is enough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't expect you to. Delivering the message is enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Ryan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Ryan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Ryan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as all unnamed agents who vanished before us did...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as all unnamed agents who vanished before us did...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as all unnamed agents who vanished before us did...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whether victory is possible or not, the Institution will fulfill its duty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whether victory is possible or not, the Institution will fulfill its duty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whether victory is possible or not, the Institution will fulfill its duty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Duty, huh? Honestly, the Institution never gets a break...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Duty, huh? Honestly, the Institution never gets a break...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Duty, huh? Honestly, the Institution never gets a break...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But isn't a gamble with no odds just boring?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But isn't a gamble with no odds just boring?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But isn't a gamble with no odds just boring?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, what do you say, Chief?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, what do you say, Chief?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, what do you say, Chief?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you join hands with me, I could raise your odds by at least 5%.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you join hands with me, I could raise your odds by at least 5%.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you join hands with me, I could raise your odds by at least 5%.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Abigail...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Abigail...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Abigail...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agnes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agnes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agnes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I here? That's kind of hurtful...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I here? That's kind of hurtful...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I here? That's kind of hurtful...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course I came to help my little darlings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course I came to help my little darlings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course I came to help my little darlings.
